deliverable: A single coherent hardening pass on custom bash scripts and test files to ensure runtime reliability and consistent execution.

tasks.description: Add dependency validation to `airootfs/usr/local/bin/neos-autoupdate.sh` to explicitly check for `snapper` before proceeding with update operations. If missing, log an error and exit gracefully (exit code 0) to prevent silent data loss without failing the systemd unit.
Enforce strict bash error handling by ensuring `set -euo pipefail` is active in `airootfs/usr/local/bin/neos-liveuser-setup` and `airootfs/usr/local/bin/neos-installer-partition.sh`.
Fix inconsistent script permissions by ensuring all `.sh` files in the `tests/` directory are marked as executable (`chmod +x`).

constraints: Do not add any new features or capabilities to the scripts.
Do not modify the ISO build pipeline or configuration.
Limit changes strictly to error handling, dependency validation, and file permissions.
